overview: Izzet Control in Standard leverages blue disruption and red removal to stabilize against early pressure before deploying resilient finishers. The deck aims to outlast opponents by controlling the board and generating incremental card advantage. Signature cards like Tablet of Discovery and Ashling's Command provide the necessary value engines to transition into a late-game advantage.
win_conditions: Outlasting opponents with superior card advantage
Deploying resilient finishers like Colorstorm Stallion
Generating incremental value with Ashling's Command and Tablet of Discovery

keep_criteria: Hands with early interaction and a land
Hands containing Tablet of Discovery or Ashling's Command with mana
Hands with two-land starts that include a counterspell or removal
mulligan_criteria: Mana screws with no early interaction
Hands heavy on finishers without disruption
Three-land starts lacking early game answers

early_game: Play lands and hold up mana for counterspells
Use red removal to clear early threats
Prioritize surviving turns 1-3 over developing board presence
mid_game: Deploy Tablet of Discovery to filter and draw into answers
Use Ashling's Command to stabilize and generate card advantage
Begin applying pressure with resilient creatures like Colorstorm Stallion
late_game: Leverage Ashling's Command's triggered abilities to outvalue opponents
Use Colorstorm Stallion's evasion and power to close the game
Maintain hand size and mana advantage to dictate the pace

key_cards.name: Colorstorm Stallion
key_cards.notes: Hold up red mana to activate its ability for evasion or extra damage, using it to bypass blockers or close out games.

key_cards.name: Ashling's Command
key_cards.notes: Use its modal abilities to draw cards, protect permanents, or gain life, triggering its enter-the-battlefield ability for additional value.

key_cards.name: Tablet of Discovery
key_cards.notes: Cast it to exile opponent's threats and draw cards, or use it to protect your own key permanents while filtering your deck.

sequencing_tips: Hold up blue mana for counterspells before committing to red removal
Trigger Ashling's Command abilities before casting Tablet of Discovery to maximize card draw
Save Colorstorm Stallion's ability for when it can bypass a key blocker or deal lethal damage

matchups.advice: Prioritize early interaction and life total preservation, using Ashling's Command to stabilize.
Race with Colorstorm Stallion and use Tablet of Discovery to disrupt their game plan.
Control the early game and transition into your value engines before they establish a board.

overview_evidence.evidence_span: Izzet Control archetype, Standard format, signature cards

win_conditions_evidence.evidence_span: Signature cards and control archetype principles
